view.launcher.name: Review
view.launcher.welcome:
Review your code, line by line — nothing is approved until every line is seen and every finding is handled.
[Start / Open Review](command:codereview.openOrStart)
[Open in New Window](command:codereview.openInNewWindow)
Pick the analysis model or language:
[Select Model](command:codereview.pickModel)
[Switch Language](command:codereview.pickLanguage)
config.language.auto: Follow the VS Code display language
config.language.description: Language for the whole AI Coding Review experience — both the extension UI (status bar, prompts, panels) and all LLM output (findings, fix proposals, explanations, global conclusions). Command titles in the Command Palette follow the VS Code display language.
config.focusedWorkbench.description: When opening the AI Coding Review workbench, close the side bar and hide the activity bar so the workbench takes over the main editor area; restored automatically when the workbench is closed.
